title: Greek: Adakryn Nemontai Aiona
content:
'A New commandment,' said the smiling Muse,
    'I give my darling son, Thou shalt not preach';--
    Luther, Fox, Behmen, Swedenborg, grew pale,
    And, on the instant, rosier clouds upbore
    Hafiz and Shakspeare with their shining choirs.
meaning:
Ralph Waldo Emerson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Greek: Adakryn Nemontai Aiona"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
